summary: Trust Integration to Product Flows testing complete. Backend: 16/16 tests PASSED. Frontend: Profile page verified with field-trust-block, ai-profile-interpretation, and trust values (value=51.3, risk=5.8, state=יציב). Daily orientation, globe points, mission joins, and onboarding actions all create trust events correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: trust_integration.py correctly implements mapping rules: daily_action(direction-based, impact=3+streak*0.5 capped at 15, auth=1.0), globe_point(contribute, impact=3, auth=0.8), mission_join(contribute, impact=5, auth=0.9), onboarding(direction-mapped, impact=2, auth=0.7)
on_daily_action called at orientation.py:1619 after daily answer with action_taken=true
on_globe_point called at orientation.py:3536 after globe point added
on_mission_joined called at social.py:313 after mission join
on_onboarding_action called at admin.py:165 after first action
on_invite_used called at auth.py:94 when invite code redeemed during registration
No risk signals mapped yet (as expected per problem statement)
Trust values properly accumulate across multiple actions
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trust integration to product flows verified. Daily action flow creates trust events (POST daily-base -> GET daily-question -> POST daily-answer with action_taken=true). Globe points (POST /api/orientation/globe-point) and mission joins (POST /api/orientation/missions/join) and onboarding actions (POST /api/onboarding/first-action) all increase total_actions and value_score in GET /api/user/{user_id}/trust. Profile page at /profile/{user_id} displays field-trust-block with value/risk/state and ai-profile-interpretation. API fields: value_score (not total_value), risk_score, trust_score, total_actions.
manual_trust_endpoints_verified: GET /api/user/{user_id}/trust - returns value_score, risk_score, trust_score, total_actions
POST /api/actions - requires auth, creates manual trust action
POST /api/risk-signal - creates risk signal (valid signal_types: aggression, deception, disruption, manipulation, spam)

mocked_apis.note: All trust integration flows use real database and real AI interpretation
